draft_prompts.planner: Break down the 'All-in-one simulation-based inference' paper into its constituent parts, identifying key tasks and dependencies. Consider the implementation of VESDE, Simformer model, training process, inference process, NPE, NRE, and NLE methods.
draft_prompts.code_gen: Write the necessary Python code to implement each of the mentioned models and methods. Ensure that the code is well-documented and follows best practices for readability and maintainability.
draft_prompts.tester: Develop a testing framework to validate the performance of each model and method. This includes generating test data, running experiments, and analyzing results to identify any issues or areas for improvement.
